title: Emeritus is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Emeritus is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Emeritus, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Emeritus:
Emeritus is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emeritus!
